moreOptions.title: Do more with Uncapped
moreOptions.pay: Pay a bill/invoice with Uncapped BillPay
moreOptions.withdrawCash: Withdraw funds to your bank account
moreOptions.referAndEarn: Refer brands to Uncapped and earn up to $1,000

lineOfCredit.title: Line of credit
lineOfCredit.pendingCopy: Your recent draw request is pending until you <cta>sign your contract</cta>
lineOfCredit.recalculationNoticeTitle_one: Your Available Credit Limit will be recalculated in {{count}} day
lineOfCredit.recalculationNoticeTitle_other: Your Available Credit Limit will be recalculated in {{count}} days
lineOfCredit.recalculationNoticeContent: As your payouts increase, your credit limit will increase up to {{maxCreditLimit}}. <cta>Learn how we calculate your Available Credit Limit</cta>

businessInsights.title: Business insights
businessInsights.description: Get business insights in your Uncapped dashboard. Track revenue, expenses, and growth all in one place. See where your money’s going and get visibility of vital projections to keep your growth on track.
businessInsights.descriptionVariant: Get inventory insights in your Uncapped dashboard. Understand how your inventory is valued, track stock levels, and identify slow-moving products.
businessInsights.joinedDescription: Thanks for joining the waitlist! We’ll notify you when {{title}} is ready.

accountManagerWillContact.title: Great! Your account manager will be in touch within 24 hours
accountManagerWillContact.subtitle: Keep an eye on the inbox at {{email}}

welcome.title: Welcome to Uncapped
welcome.content: We believe in long term partnerships with our customers. If you keep your data sources connected and your business remains healthy, we’ll offer you additional funding to help scale your business.

topUp.title: You’ve unlocked up to
topUp.content: It’s great to see your business doing so well! You can now access a new top-up offer based on your recent performance

applyFromPartnership.title: You’ve unlocked up to
applyFromPartnership.content: Welcome to Uncapped! Based on your previous loan information you could be eligible for additional funding

amazonConsent.subtitle: You’ve selected additional funding of
amazonConsent.content: We need you to link your {{productType}} to your Amazon Seller account before we can deposit your funds into your account

pre-offer.title: You’ve unlocked up to
pre-offer.content: Welcome to Uncapped! Based on your previous loan information you could be eligible for additional funding

post-offer.title: You’ve selected additional funding of
post-offer.content: We require a few more details before we can deposit your funds into your account

offerAvailable.title: Funding approved! Up to
offerAvailable.content: Great news! Your new funding application has been approved. Select an offer to disburse your cash.

missingMonthlyFinancialData.title: Missing monthly financial data
missingMonthlyFinancialData.content: Keeping your financial data up to date helps us monitor your business for additional capital and ensures a smoother process when you take a draw. As your financials weren’t submitted on time, draw requests may take up to 5 additional business days to process.

missingData.title: Missing data
missingData.content: Some of the data we need to continue offering you funding in future either needs to be reconnected or updated. You could miss out on top-ups or refinancing opportunities if you don’t keep your information up to date

checks.amazon_missing: Connect at least one Amazon account
checks.sales_error: Resolve your Revenue source connection error
checks.sales_missing: Connect at least one Revenue source

eligibleMissingData.title: Top-Up unlocked up to
eligibleMissingData.content: It’s great to see your business doing so well! We’re ready to offer you more funding to help support your continued growth. Complete the gaps in your data to generate an offer

rejected.title: New funding isn’t available at this time
rejected.subtitle: This is because {{reason}}
rejected.content: Please consider reapplying whenever your business circumstances change. You can apply again in {{days}}.

awaitingActivation.title: We’re processing your funding
awaitingActivation.content: We’re completing our final verification checks, this normally takes 24 hours. We will notify you by email once completed. If you need to change any information, please contact hello@uncapped-demo.invalid

dailyPayout.title: You’ve unlocked an offer where you can
dailyPayout.heading: Get Paid Every Day
dailyPayout.content: With Daily Payouts you no longer need to wait up to 35 days to receive your marketplace payout

lateFees.title: Payments are overdue
lateFees.content: Late fees are added to your account daily when you miss payments. <button>Contact customer support</button> to make a payment or discuss next steps.

sellersFi.title: Payments will continue to be collected by SellersFi until July 16th 2025
sellersFi.copy: You may notice some discrepancies between the balance shown on SellersFi and Uncapped. We’ll reconcile your balance in the Uncapped portal when we receive confirmation of payments from SellersFi.

locMissingDocuments.title: Submit your monthly financial data
locMissingDocuments.copy: Failure to do so may mean that it takes us longer to process your draw by up to 5 business days. You can also upload this when submitting a new draw request.

future.title: Your payment amount has changed
future.increasing: Under the <href>loan agreement</href> that you signed with {{ source }} , your loan transitioned to the Payment Period on {{ date }} resulting in your regular payments increasing.
future.frequency: Your payment frequency will remain the same ({{period}}) and your next upcoming payment is on {{date}}.
future.frequencyNoUpcoming: Your payment frequency will remain the same ({{period}}).
future.faq: Want to know more? <href>Read our full FAQ section</href>

past.title: Your payment amount will change from {{date}}
past.increasing: As detailed in the Disclosure Table of your <href>loan agreement</href> with {{ source }}, your loan will transition to the Payment Period and your regular payments will increase from {{month}}.
past.frequency: Your payment frequency will remain the same ({{period}}).
past.faq: Want to know more? <href>Read our full FAQ section</href>

SmsConsentModal.title: Funding updates on the go
SmsConsentModal.content: We’re releasing new features to help you stay on top of your finances. Message frequency varies. Standard message and data rates apply. <href>Privacy policy</href>
SmsConsentModal.label: Personal contact number
SmsConsentModal.submit: I agree to receive SMS messages
